name: codex-weixin-notifier
description: Send Weixin and Feishu notifications and route isolated numbered Codex tasks from multiple bots.

interface.shortDescription: Notify Weixin/Feishu and route isolated Codex tasks.
interface.longDescription: Adds Weixin/iLink and multi-account Feishu application-bot workflows for Codex completion notifications, media, and isolated numbered task routing.
defaultPrompt: Help me configure Weixin completion notifications.
Configure a Feishu application bot for Codex tasks.
Send a test Codex completion notification.
